response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with 15+ years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js fundamentals, hands-on React and MongoDB work, AWS CDK exposure, and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure development at re:cinq — all closely aligned with the role. The primary gap is the absence of explicit NestJS or Vitest usage and no Kotlin work mentioned, which are core stack items. His deep TDD culture, open-source test tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and conference-level knowledge sharing indicate strong engineering maturity worth exploring in an interview.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js track record across multiple production environments (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq) with direct React and MongoDB experience matching the primary stack
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture evidenced by creating test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), running TDD workshops, and practicing trunk-based TDD/CI/CD at RIDE Capital
concerns: NestJS is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the core backend framework; real-world familiarity is unverified
No Kotlin experience listed; Java is in the skills section but only surfaces for robotic-arm and mobile-orchestration tooling rather than backend services

Testing stack gap: Vitest and Playwright are not mentioned; testing expertise is demonstrated primarily through D-language frameworks, leaving uncertainty about proficiency with the specified JS/TS testing ecosystem
